positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a celestial forest scene at twilight. Silhouette of ancient, intertwined bioluminescent trees with glowing, alien flora. The foreground features minimalist geometric mountains and a calm, mirrored lake reflecting the cosmic colors. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing cyan. Composition is perfectly balanced, suitable for a centered apparel print. Clean lines, strong contrast, vector art aesthetic, high saturation, studio lighting, centered composition, intricate detail.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, cropped, extra limbs, malformed hands, bad anatomy, oversaturated, messy, photo-realistic
